/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/user_defined_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libuser_defined_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libuser_defined_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/user_defined_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/user_defined_interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/digital_state__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/lyrical/lib:/home/lyraglow/Projects/BikeDigitalTwin/build/user_defined_interfaces:/opt/ros/lyrical/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu: /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so libuser_defined_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfastcdr.so.2.3.6 /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_buffer.so
